시편 148:1.content: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh from the heavens! Praise him in the heights!

시편 148:2.content: Praise him, all his angels! Praise him, all his army!

시편 148:3.content: Praise him, sun and moon! Praise him, all you shining stars!

시편 148:4.content: Praise him, you heavens of heavens, you waters that are above the heavens.

시편 148:5.content: Let them praise Yahweh’s name, for he commanded, and they were created.

시편 148:6.content: He has also established them forever and ever. He has made a decree which will not pass away.

시편 148:7.content: Praise Yahweh from the earth, you great sea creatures, and all depths;

시편 148:8.content: lightning and hail, snow and clouds; stormy wind, fulfilling his word;

시편 148:9.content: mountains and all hills; fruit trees and all cedars;

시편 148:10.content: wild animals and all livestock; small creatures and flying birds;

시편 148:11.content: kings of the earth and all peoples; princes and all judges of the earth;

시편 148:12.content: both young men and maidens; old men and children:

시편 148:13.content: let them praise Yahweh’s name, for his name alone is exalted. His glory is above the earth and the heavens.

시편 148:14.content: He has lifted up the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints, even of the children of Israel, a people near to him. Praise Yah!
